metadata.description: HarnessFlow — From idea to shipped product: high-quality engineering workflows for AI agents. Spec-anchored SDD, gated TDD, evidence-based routing, independent reviews, and formal closeout.

plugins.name: harness-flow
plugins.description: HarnessFlow — a cross-platform AI coding-agent development-workflow skill suite built on a three-layer quality model: SDD (spec-driven) for the right thing, TDD (test-driven) for proven behavior, and Clean Code for code worth keeping, with human-on-the-loop collaboration. Ships 15 skills (7 phase: using-hf, hf-specify, hf-design, hf-tdd, hf-review, hf-ship, hf-fix; 5 overlay: hf-clean-code + c/cpp/java/python-coding-standards; 2 domain: backend/frontend-development; 1 tool: coding-standards-creator) and 7 slash commands (/hf, /spec, /plan, /build, /review, /ship, /fix). Supports Claude Code, Cursor, and OpenCode. Covers accepted-requirement to reviewed-implementation and closeout; not product discovery, release ops, or rollout.
